title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin builds out Anthropic's playbook for agent harnesses in large codebases, demonstrating that the harness context and tooling matters more than the model itself. He constructs an "AI Layer" composed of CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and a bundling plugin.
